decisionRule: prioritize lowest active skill, then overdue review and unresolved errors

gates.speaking: speech recognition, recording attempt, or explicit no-microphone fallback
gates.writing: level-based length and topic coverage score >= 65
gates.exit: grammar and situational quiz both correct

limitations: speech score is transcript similarity, not phoneme-level pronunciation scoring
free response scoring is offline and rule-based
no scientific superiority claim over other products without independent user study
